critical_fixes_applied: Fixed items_for paths (NextToken → Accounts) in 3 discoveries
Fixed emit structures (removed incorrect nesting) in 3 discoveries
Fixed 20+ field path mismatches in checks (Organization.* → flat, Policies.* → flat)
Added on_error: continue to describe_effective_policy for accounts without policies

known_limitations.issue: References item.PasswordPolicy.* but describe_account doesn't return password policy (IAM API only)
known_limitations.recommendation: Use IAM API (get_account_password_policy) or mark as cross-service check

known_limitations.issue: References item.Organization.PasswordPolicy.* but Organizations API doesn't return password policy
known_limitations.recommendation: Simplified to check FeatureSet only, or use IAM API

known_limitations.issue: References MasterAccountJoinedTimestamp which doesn't exist in describe_organization response
known_limitations.recommendation: Use list_accounts and check JoinedTimestamp for each account

known_limitations.issue: References item.RootAccessKeys and item.OwnerAccessKeys which don't exist in list_accounts response
known_limitations.recommendation: Requires IAM API calls to verify root/owner access keys

cross_service_suggestions.recommendation: Password policy checks should use IAM API (get_account_password_policy) instead of Organizations API
Access key checks require IAM API calls (list_access_keys, get_access_key_last_used)
